posts.description: Look at these people just existing on the subway, minding their own business. Absolutely wild.
Just launched my new open-source Python library for real-time sentiment analysis! Check it out and let me know your thoughts.
Unpopular opinion: mechanical keyboards are way too loud for open office spaces.
Trying out this new recipe for homemade ramen. Took 8 hours to simmer the broth!

comments.content: I hate those type of people theyre so ugly

Post a picture of yourself then

comments.content: Honestly they're just living their lives, leave them alone lol
replies: Exactly, people love hating for no reason.

comments.content: Awesome project! Does it support asynchronous processing or streaming text inputs?
replies: Yes! Asynchronous processing was added in v1.1.
